title: Fig. 58 in Morphology And Relationships Of Apternodus And Other Extinct, Zalambdodont, Placental Mammals
author: ASHER, ROBERT J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 58. Strict consensus trees from the same analyses shown in figure 57, but excluding taxa with greater than 40% missing data. (A) ordered (22 MPTs, 341 steps) and (B) unordered (10 MPTs, 338 steps). Notation as in figure 57.
